mnemonics: V.W.A.R.L. - View Groups Wrap Around Real Layouts (The order of a typical view hierarchy: View -> ViewGroup -> wrap_content/match_parent -> Arrange -> Resource file -> Layout)
keyPoints: Use ConstraintLayout as the base for flexible and flat view hierarchies
Define UI elements and their properties in XML resource files
Use dp (density-independent pixels) for dimensions to ensure proper scaling across devices
commonMistakes: Using px instead of dp for dimensions, causing improper scaling on different screen densities
Creating deep nested view hierarchies (e.g., multiple LinearLayouts) which hurt performance
Forgetting to assign unique IDs to views that need to be referenced in Java/Kotlin code
